items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M15117 Milk Tea with Cream Small. Inspired by Baroque jewelry, this Capucines Small bag features shell Monogram floral accents on the chain, reflecting the vibrant style of the new Daydream collection. Crafted in Taurillon calfskin with a refined silhouette, the flap can be worn open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for versatile carrying. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm

items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
items.name_cn:
Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
Featuring exquisite cowhide leather and matte metal hardware to convey a modern attitude, this new horizontal design gathers classic elements from the same series. The KHl adjustable woven chain makes it convenient to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, making it a trendy choice for carrying essentials like a phone and a short wallet.
Dimensions: 27.0 x 18.0 x 9.0

items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M25087 White mini Capucines Series. The Capucines mini handbag was born in 2013, named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini handbag features full-grain Taurillon leather, blending multiple brand elements: leather-wrapped LV letters, a handle inspired by classic trunks, and a distinctive flap featuring Monogram flowers. With the shoulder strap, you can switch between hand and shoulder carry. Dimensions: 21 × 13.6 × 8 cm

items.name_en: Premium quality, B-family's latest soft structured messenger bag. Crafted from protective cotton-blend fabric, decorated with fine knit B-family exclusive check and lined with the same fabric. Named for the B-clasp on the front pocket, which bears the Burberry logo. The curved design incorporates brushed metal hardware and a hand-stitched top handle, inspired by a saddle shape. Equipped with an adjustable mesh shoulder strap with leather trim and a discreet Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossed detail. Dimensions 27.5 x 11 x 19cm

items.name_en: Premium quality, B's latest B-shaped buckle bucket bag
items.name_cn:
Premium quality, B's latest B-shaped buckle bucket bag
Crafted from calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop, named after the B-shaped buckle accessory engraved with the brand logo. Paired with a cotton blend lining and an adjustable mesh shoulder strap. Adorned with fine Burberry check, interpreted in a signature sand color. The compact and versatile shape allows you to switch between handbag, shoulder, or crossbody styles.
Size 21x8.5x22cm

specs.rawTitle:
